title: Hypothesis Testing Procedure
mermaid: graph TD A1[State Hypothesis: Null (H0) & Alternative (H1)] style A1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff A2[Define Significance Level (α)] style A2 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff B1["Choose Appropriate Test Statistic"] style B1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 C1["Gather Sample Data"] style C1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff C2["Calculate Test Statistic Value"] style C2 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff C3["Determine p-value OR Critical Value(s)"] style C3 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff D1["p-value ≤ α ?"] style D1 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff E1[Reject Null Hypothesis (H0)] style E1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff E2[Fail to Reject Null Hypothesis (H0)] style E2 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff F1[Draw Conclusion: Interpret Results in Context] style F1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff D2["Test Statistic in Rejection Region?"] style D2 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff A1 --> A2 A2 --> B1 B1 --> C1 C1 --> C2 C2 --> C3 C3 --> D1 D1 -- Yes --> E1 D1 -- No --> E2 E1 --> F1 E2 --> F1
source_text: Source information to be added - please specify the book, paper, or reference material used by the LLM to generate this flowchart.
